## Summary

- What changed?
- Why are we making this change?

## Agile Context

- Story / ticket:
- Sprint goal:
- Risk level: low / medium / high

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m compileall backend`
- [ ] `cd backend && python -m unittest discover -v`
- [ ] Frontend JS syntax checks passed
- [ ] Docker / compose changes validated if touched

## Definition Of Done

- [ ] Security and auth impact reviewed
- [ ] User-facing docs updated when needed
- [ ] Rollback path is clear
